identity.fantasy: A compact forest courier who controls space through quick movement and a readable universal firing stance.
silhouette: Teal hood framing two rounded ears
Large ringed tail and rust-orange side satchel

primary.name: Courier Firing Stance
primary.counterplay: Advance during the crouched wind-up, bait the weapon event, then punish Nori during the open recovery pose.

ability.name: Tailwind Brake
ability.description: Nori plants her feet and releases a short body-driven air burst to regain space.
ability.counterplay: Jump over the low burst or wait outside its short range; Nori cannot move during startup.
ability.interruption: If interrupted before frame 4, no burst is created and the cooldown is not spent.

weaknesses: Low weight makes strong launch attacks dangerous near arena edges.
Attack and ability recoveries are punishable at close range.

artBrief.spriteSheet: One independent right-facing body-only sheet per state, 256x256 cells, row-major order, transparent runtime PNG, feet-center pivot.
artBrief.windUpCue: Nori lowers her stance and visibly braces before the event frame.
artBrief.impactCue: Body recoil is readable while weapon muzzle/projectile/impact remain separate event-driven assets.
artBrief.recoveryCue: Nori opens her stance and lowers her hands for two readable recovery frames.
avoid: Named franchise characters, assets, logos, terminology, or move lists
Specific weapon, muzzle flash, projectile, impact, dust, or trail baked into production body sheets
Unreadable detail or frame-to-frame identity drift

stateTransitions: idle|walk -> jump_start -> rise -> fall -> land -> idle
implementationNotes.notes: Character and weapon data are composed at runtime. Simulation owns events, knockback, and transitions; renderer only displays frames and event-driven cosmetics.
